prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次为约 9799 名→10623 名→18037 名→17944 名→18260 名。2021–2022 年在 1 万名左右，2023 年大幅后移至约 1.8 万名，此后 2024–2025 年稳定在 1.79–1.83 万区间，近 3 年累计后移约 7600 名；2025 年基准约 18260 名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划 2021–2025 年均为 8 人，2026 年计划仍为 8 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩招变化，计划因素对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 65 名，近年排名在 59–72 名之间波动，整体处于中上 211 水平；2022 年高考周期内因拟录取研究生不当言论事件出现偏负面舆情；2026 年周期内再次出现类似师德师风事件，评价为偏负面，可能对报考热度产生轻微抑制作用。抖音热度为较热（总排名第 57），短视频曝光量中等，未出现高热关注信号。历史投档异常数据中未见该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评 A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评 A-，共 5 个 A 类学科，工科实力较为均衡，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在渝招生专业中，人工智能（实验班）属计算机大类，社会热度高热推荐但近年有所降温；环境工程属环境类，社会热度明显劝退；工业设计热度一般。重庆物理类考生 2021–2025 年持续增长（98954→139478），2026 年总考生约 20.9 万，按近年物理类占比约 65.5% 估算约 13.69 万人，较 2025 年物理类 13.95 万人略减约 1.85%，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在 1.8 万附近趋于稳定、2026 年招生计划持平、考生规模小幅缩减（竞争略缓）以及声誉偏负面（轻微抑制热度）等因素，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 18260 名基础上略有前移。预测最低位次约 18060 名，区间 17560–18560 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工业设计。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 环境工程（环工和经统双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（17560–18560 名）内，建议以二档工业设计为主攻方向、一档人工智能（实验班）作为冲刺、三档环境工程（双学士学位）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如 17500 名以内）可重点冲刺人工智能（实验班）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 9799 → 10623 → 18037 → 17944 → 18260. In 2021–2022, rankings were around 10,000; in 2023, they significantly shifted back to about 18,000; thereafter, in 2024–2025, they stabilized in the 17,900–18,300 range, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7,600 over the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 18,260. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Chongqing was 8 students from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 8 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, so the plan factor has no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 65th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 59th and 72nd, overall at an upper-middle 211 level. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, there was a negative public opinion incident due to inappropriate remarks by prospective graduate students; in the 2026 cycle, a similar teacher ethics incident occurred, evaluated as somewhat negative, which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 57th overall), with moderate short video exposure and no high-attention signals. No historical enrollment anomalies such as gaps were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Environmental Science and Engineering received an A rating, while Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering received A- ratings, totaling 5 A-level disciplines, indicating a balanced strength in engineering, which supports applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the majors the university recruits in Chongqing, Artificial Intelligence (Experimental Class) belongs to the computer category, with high social popularity but recent cooling; Environmental Engineering belongs to the environmental category, with clear social discouragement; Industrial Design has average popularity. The number of Chongqing Physics Category examinees grew continuously from 2021 to 2025 (98,954 → 139,478), with total examinees in 2026 approximately 209,000. Estimated by the recent Physics Category proportion of about 65.5%, this is about 136,900, a slight decrease of about 1.85% from the 2025 Physics Category of 139,500, slightly easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings around 18,000, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight reduction in examinee numbers (slightly easing competition), and a somewhat negative reputation (slightly suppressing enthusiasm), it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift forward from the 2025 baseline of 18,260. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18,060, with a range of 17,560–18,560.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Environmental Engineering (Dual Bachelor's Degree in Environmental Engineering and Economics and Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (17,560–18,560), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Industrial Design as the main direction, Tier 1 Artificial Intelligence (Experimental Class) as a reach, and Tier 3 Environmental Engineering (Dual Bachelor's Degree) as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 17,500), focus on reaching for Artificial Intelligence (Experimental Class).
